writeup: Questions around the Bills' cornerback depth continued to draw scrutiny, with analysts noting that while Christian Benford, Maxwell Hairston, and rookie Davison Igbinosun anchor the top three spots, a proven veteran backup remains a need. A detailed feature revisited wide receiver Joshua Palmer's left ankle injury from last season, revealing the damage was more complex than originally disclosed. Tre'Davious White's roster status also generated debate as the team finalizes its secondary heading into summer.

articles.title: Bills still need proven CB depth behind Benford, Hairston & Igbinosun
Joshua Palmer's left ankle injury: more than first disclosed
Tre'Davious White latest news and roster outlook
